description: Composition Grey trousers made of poly-viscose blend, that has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, plastic zipper and button closure on the front, loops on the waist to secure a belt and extended hems that can be trimmed to suit the wearer's height Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash gentle Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Avoid soaking, remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on prints or embellishments Upgrade your sophisticated style with these grey pants from belmonte. The poly-viscose blend fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers make it perfect for formal and semi-formal wear. Team these with slim fit shirts and leather shoes for a well groomed look. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 44" Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”
